name: CFSC the Check Cashing Place Walnut Park
description_short: CFSC The Check Cashing Place Walnut Park offers check cashing, money transfers, prepaid debit cards, and bill payment services without requiring a bank account.
description_long:
CFSC (Community Financial Services) operates a check-cashing location at 2602 E Florence Ave in Huntington Park, California, serving the Walnut Park area. The company positions itself as a one-stop financial services provider for consumers who need quick access to cash and money management services without traditional banking infrastructure. CFSC has established itself as part of a larger network of check-cashing locations across multiple states.

The location offers a comprehensive suite of services including check cashing (personal and business checks), money orders, money transfers (including Western Union), prepaid debit cards (Yes! Debit Account), ATM access, electronic bill payment, foreign currency exchange (80+ countries), prepaid cellular services, phone resale through EcoATM kiosks, transit/MetroCard purchases, and tax refund check cashing. The company emphasizes speed and convenience—checks are cashed without waiting for funds to clear, and no bank account or credit check is required for most services.

The Huntington Park location distinguishes itself through extended hours (9am-8pm most days, with Friday opening at 8am and Sunday closing at 5pm), multiple service offerings under one roof, and acceptance of various government-issued photo IDs. CFSC partners with major financial brands including Western Union, Yes (prepaid cards), Boost Mobile, EcoATM, and CoinFlip. The company actively recruits customer service staff in the area, suggesting operational stability and growth.

As a check-cashing service, CFSC fills a legitimate need for unbanked and underbanked consumers, particularly in communities with limited bank branch access. However, check-cashing fees (not disclosed on the website) and foreign currency exchange margins are not transparent. The service model inherently caters to consumers without bank accounts, which may indicate either convenience preference or financial exclusion. No information about regulatory oversight, complaint resolution, or customer service guarantees appears on the provided website content.
address: 2602 E Florence Ave, Huntington Park, CA 90255

company_info.headquarters: 2602 E Florence Ave, Huntington Park, CA 90255

pros: No bank account required to cash checks or use most services
Extended hours including Friday early opening (8am) and weekend service (open Sunday)
Multiple service offerings in one location (checks, money orders, bill pay, transfers, debit cards, ATMs)
Accepts various government-issued photo IDs including foreign passports and student IDs
No credit check required for Yes! Debit Account prepaid card
Foreign currency exchange available for 80+ countries
Money transfers available to anywhere in the world via Western Union partnership
Immediate check cashing without funds clearing delays
cons: Check cashing fees are not disclosed on the website, making true cost comparison impossible
No information provided about foreign currency exchange rates or markups
Limited transparency about acceptable check types, rejection criteria, or dispute resolution procedures
Service availability claimed to vary by location but no detail provided on which services are available at this specific address
No information about data security, privacy practices, or regulatory compliance beyond cookie policies
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked consumers in the Huntington Park area who need immediate check access
International money senders and recipients who need worldwide transfer capabilities
Consumers without traditional bank accounts who need basic financial services (bill pay, prepaid debit)
Business owners seeking same-day business check cashing without bank account requirements
diagnosis: CFSC Walnut Park is best for unbanked and underbanked consumers in the Huntington Park area who need immediate check cashing, money transfers, or basic financial services without a bank account. The primary caveat is that check-cashing fees and service costs are not disclosed on their website, and customers should call (323) 582-1777 to confirm service availability at this specific location and understand the true cost of services before using them.
